title: Caramel Fresh British Apples Crumble
description: A warm and comforting dessert featuring fresh British apples, crunchy oat topping, and a drizzle of caramel sauce, Whole30-friendly and perfect for meal prep.

ingredients.name: Apples, British
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other firm variety

instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples into thin wedges.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced apples, coconut sugar, cinnamon, and salt.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the oats, almond flour, and unsalted butter until crumbly.
Add the eggs to the oat mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Spread the oat dough evenly over the apple mixture.
Bake the crumble for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Remove the crumble from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Drizzle with caramel sauce and heavy cream (if using).
